prompt:
Create a HTML Beatmaking game for all music lover by infinitely able to read any .json that contain music note instruction only within 4/8/16/32 beat
 
layout will be
[play] [pause] [stop] [SAVE to webM/wav]

BPM [set]
[4/8/16/32] beat loop]
low mid high [pinned slider]
track 1 ".JSONREADER"
track 2 
track 3
track 4

"this 4 track above could be anything" 

KICK
bass
Hihat
Snare

use your AI to fill the track!

a hint promt for your AI will be:
a
b
c
d

where all AI and Human can make music together
resultSummary: I will generate a high-quality HTML Beatmaking game that allows users to read music note instructions from any .json file and create their own music with a variety of track options and effects.
thoughts: To create a high-quality HTML Beatmaking game that allows users to read music note instructions from any .json file and create their own music with a variety of track options and effects, including infinitely looping 4/8/16/32 beat patterns. I will use HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to develop the game. I'll use the Web Audio API for audio processing and the FileSaver.js library to save the generated audio in .webm or .wav format.
context: Used historical context and lessons learned.
